title: Thumbnail Modpack
description: A Minecraft modpack made for content creators and thumbnail artists.
body:
# ⭐ Thumbnail Modpack
A lightweight, creator-focused modpack made specifically for Minecraft **thumbnail makers** and screenshot artists.

This pack gives you everything you need to create clean, high-quality, cinematic Minecraft shots — fast performance, improved visuals, powerful posing tools, and high-resolution screenshot features — all while staying fully vanilla-friendly.

---

## 🎯 What This Modpack Is For
Designed for:
- YouTube thumbnail creators  
- TikTok / Shorts creators  
- Map makers  
- Screenshot artists  
- Anyone who needs beautiful Minecraft images  

---

# ✨ Key Features

## 🧍‍♂️ Mannequin — The Ultimate Thumbnail Tool
The **Mannequin mod** is the centerpiece of this pack.

It lets you create fully poseable, customizable player models in-game — perfect for thumbnails without needing a second player.

**Mannequin lets you:**
- Pose arms, legs, head, and body freely  
- Load ANY skin (files, URLs, or your own)  
- Duplicate mannequins for consistent scenes  
- Position models with precision  
- Save and reuse poses  
- Create thumbnails solo with zero effort  

If you make thumbnails, this feature alone saves HOURS.

---

## ⚡ Boosted Performance
Built on the full Fabric optimization stack:
- Sodium  
- FerriteCore  
- Lithium  
- FastQuit  
- RRLS  
- ImmediateFast  
- EntityCulling  

Expect **higher FPS**, faster loading, smoother chunk rendering, and stable performance even with shaders.

---

## 🎨 Clean Visual Enhancements (Vanilla-Friendly)
- Continuity (connected textures)  
- LambDynamicLights  
- BetterGrassify  
- Entity Texture Features  
- Entity Model Features  
- Polytone  
- Shader support via Iris  
- Included shaderpacks (CMS & WEM)  

Your game stays faithful to vanilla — just brighter, smoother, and more cinematic.

---

## 📸 Screenshot-Focused Tools
### **Fabrishot**
Take ultra-high resolution screenshots (4K, 8K, 16K+ depending on GPU).

### **Zoomify**
Smooth OptiFine-style zoom for tight framing.

### **Gamma Utils**
Control brightness for perfect lighting in dark scenes.

### **Controlify**
If you pose with a controller, this adds flawless controller support.

---

# ❓ Q&A

### **Q: What makes this modpack different?**
**A:** It’s built specifically for thumbnail creators — mannequins, shaders, high-res screenshots, dynamic lighting, and clean visuals.

---

### **Q: Can I use this for normal survival?**
**A:** Yes! It’s still vanilla-friendly with no gameplay changes.

---

### **Q: Do I need a good PC?**
**A:** No — Sodium and optimization mods make it run smoother than vanilla.  
Shaders are optional.

---

### **Q: Why include shaders?**
**A:** For instant cinematic lighting without setup.

---

### **Q: What version does it use?**
Minecraft **1.21.1** — Fabric loader.

---

# 📦 Included Highlights
- Mannequin (poseable characters for thumbnails)  
- Fabrishot (ultra-high-res screenshots)  
- Iris + Sodium (shaders + FPS)  
- Continuity / Entity Features (visual polish)  
- Zoomify (cinematic zoom)  
- Dynamic Lights (realistic lighting)  
- Optimization mods for smooth gameplay  

---

# 🏁 Summary
Thumbnail Modpack gives creators a fast, clean, and powerful toolkit for making professional Minecraft thumbnails, screenshots, and promotional images — without changing the vanilla feel.

Perfect for content creators who want their visuals to stand out.
